recommendations: Resolve hard live diagnostics blockers before using this trace as G2 acceptance evidence.
Final audio RMS moved more than 10 dB during the trace; pair this JSONL with audio render evidence before approving changes.
NR5 output RMS moved more than 6 dB during the trace; inspect nr5RecoveryDrive and nr5MakeupGainDb before tuning mask thresholds.
NR5 weak and strong outputs differ by more than 6 dB on average; tune normalization before judging faint-signal fidelity.
NR5 weak-input dropouts were observed; inspect nr5WeakSignalWatch.topWeakDropouts before increasing global makeup gain.
Some weak NR5 samples left the output below the input; prefer bounded weak-frame rescue over persistent makeup gain.
NR5 makeup exceeded 12 dB on one or more samples; inspect nr5WeakSignalWatch.topHotMakeup before changing recovery attack/release.
liveRecommendedActions: Wait for fresh frontend spectrum evidence before tuning NR/AGC decisions.
Refresh or reconnect the frontend before using Smart NR scene evidence.
